fields.In-Network Urgent Care Visit: Independent urgent care facility: $125 copay/visit; Hospital-affiliated urgent care facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible; Retail clinic: $45 copay/visit
fields.Out-of-Network Urgent Care Visit: Independent urgent care facility: $125 copay/visit; Hospital-affiliated urgent care facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible; Retail clinic: Not Covered
fields.In-Network Outpatient Surgery: Independent facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible; Hospital-affiliated facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible
fields.In-Network Inpatient Surgery: Independent facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible; Hospital-affiliated facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible
fields.In-Network Major Diagnostics: Independent facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible; Hospital-affiliated facility: 30% coinsurance after deductible
fields.In-Network Generic RX: 30-day supply: $20 copay/prescription; 90-day supply: $50 copay/prescription / 30-day supply: $45 copay/prescription; 90-day supply: $112.50 copay/prescription
fields.In-Network Tier 3 RX: 30-day supply: 50% coinsurance after deductible; 90-day supply: 50% coinsurance after deductible
fields.Deductible Explanation: Generally, you must pay all of the costs from providers up to the deductible amount before this plan begins to pay.
fields.In-Network RX: Value generic drugs (Tier 1): 30-day supply: $20 copay/prescription; 90-day supply: $50 copay/prescription / Generic drugs (Tier 2): 30-day supply: $45 copay/prescription; 90-day supply: $112.50 copay/prescription / Preferred brand drugs (Tier 3): 30-day supply: $80 copay/prescription; 90-day supply: $200 copay/prescription / Non-Preferred brand drugs (Tier 4): 30-day supply: 50% coinsurance after deductible; 90-day supply: 50% coinsurance after deductible / Specialty drugs (Tier 5): 50% coinsurance after deductible (Retail only)
